introSection: Wild Frontier is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Supercar currently owned & travelled by UK showman Fred Proctor.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and supports. Used to have red track with yellow supports at Frontierland.

fullText:
Wild Frontier is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Supercar currently owned & travelled by UK showman Fred Proctor.

Oval track layout.

Green track and supports. Used to have red track with yellow supports at Frontierland.
